examples: The Mariner spacecraft found that the surface of Mars, as well as that of its two moons, is pitted with impact craters formed by meteoroids falling in from space.
A smooth sea never made a skillful mariner.
Our guest right now is retired Navy captain and former Navy aviator Captain Rosemary Mariner.
For a while after the Mariner 4 mission, astronomers had grown more upbeat about the planet.
